backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Asset, RepairTicket, Part, AuditEntry, AppUser, Client, ManagedUser) and backend state maps; includes user management with password hashing, access control via MixinAuthorization, and a public config query.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three frontend/backend feature IDs to their affected files, related components, and test requirement IDs (REQ-2, REQ-3, REQ-4) covering authenticated actor calls, admin role management, and caller role queries.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's or page's purpose and notable recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart palette, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Asset Repair Tracking System' that mounts the app at the `#root` div and loads the TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and AuthProvider, shows LoginScreen when unauthenticated, and defines the TanStack Router with routes for all pages including Settings.
frontend/src/components/AddAssetForm.tsx: Dialog form for registering new assets with serial number, model, condition, status, and a dynamic client dropdown populated from the `useGetClients` hook.
frontend/src/components/AddPartForm.tsx: A dialog form component for adding a new inventory part, supporting fields like part number, name, compatible model, stock quantities, and an optional image upload with validation (type and size limits).
frontend/src/components/AssetDetailModal: A modal dialog that displays detailed information about a selected asset, including its metadata fields and a full repair history table fetched by serial number.
frontend/src/components/ClientRegistrySe: A CRUD management section for clients, providing a table view with add, rename, and delete operations via dialogs and confirmation prompts, with toast notifications for outcomes.
frontend/src/components/CreateUserDialog: A dialog form for creating a new managed user with username, password, and role fields, using the useCreateUser mutation and displaying inline validation errors and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/EditAssetForm.ts: A dialog form for editing an existing asset's model, client, status, and condition fields, pre-populated with the asset's current values and submitted via the useUpdateAsset mutation.
frontend/src/components/EditUserDialog.t: A dialog component for editing an existing user's username, password, and role, with validation and mutation via `useUpdateUser` hook.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header displaying the Verifone logo, logged-in user info with role badge, a theme toggle, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/ImportPreviewMod: A modal that previews a list of serial numbers before import, categorizing them as new or duplicate and allowing the user to confirm importing only new ones.
frontend/src/components/ImportSummaryMod: A modal that displays a summary of a completed batch import, showing counts of successfully imported, skipped duplicate, and errored serial numbers.
frontend/src/components/KPICard.tsx: A reusable card component for displaying a KPI metric with a title, value, icon, optional description, and accent color variants.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that composes the Sidebar, Header, and main content area using either children or a router Outlet.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Login page component with username/password form that authenticates via the AuthContext and displays relevant error messages.
frontend/src/components/NewRepairTicketF: A dialog form component for creating new repair tickets, allowing users to select an asset, enter fault details, assign a technician, set outcome, and add parts replaced.
frontend/src/components/PartsReplacedEdi: An inline editor component for managing a list of replaced parts, supporting adding, removing, and updating part selections and quantities from an available parts list.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and select a role to set up their profile before using the app.
frontend/src/components/RepairsByStageCh: A bar chart component that visualizes the count of repair tickets grouped by their current stage, using Recharts with theme-aware styling.
frontend/src/components/RepairTicketDeta: A dialog modal that displays full details of a repair ticket and allows authorized users to edit diagnosis, outcome, and parts replaced fields.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: A navigation sidebar component that renders links to main app sections and conditionally shows a Settings link for admin users.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A small badge component that renders a styled label for either an asset status or repair outcome enum value.
frontend/src/components/StockAdjustmentM: A modal dialog component for adjusting part stock levels, allowing users to add or remove a specified quantity with success/error toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/TopFailingModels: A horizontal bar chart component displaying the top failing terminal models by repair count, with theme-aware styling using Recharts.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: React context providing authentication state and login/logout logic, coordinating Internet Identity (II) with username/password credential verification against the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to manage II login state, identity persistence, and login status across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations (assets, repair tickets, parts, users, clients, audit trail, etc.) against the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Provides a ThemeProvider and useTheme hook for toggling between dark and light themes, persisting the preference in localStorage and applying a CSS class to the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark (industrial) themes including colors, sidebar, and scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then mounts it to the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AssetsPage.tsx: Full CRUD page for managing assets, featuring search/filter by status, add/edit/delete/view modals, CSV import with preview and summary modals, and CSV/JSON export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/AuditLogPage.tsx: Paginated audit log page that fetches all audit trail entries, supports text search across entity fields, and displays results in a sortable table with 25 entries per page.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard overview page displaying KPI cards for asset and repair metrics, two charts (repairs by stage and top failing models), and tables of recent repair tickets and recently registered assets.
frontend/src/pages/PartsInventoryPage.ts: Parts inventory page with a table of parts including thumbnail images, stock level badges, and modals for adding/editing parts with image upload support and stock adjustment functionality.
frontend/src/pages/RepairTicketsPage.tsx: Repair tickets page with search and stage-filter controls, a table of tickets with outcome badges, and modals for creating new tickets, viewing details, and editing existing tickets.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Displays analytics dashboards including top repaired assets, technician workload, most replaced parts (bar charts via Recharts), and yearly repair limit alerts, pulling data from custom query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Admin-only settings page for managing users (create, edit, delete) and client registry, with role-based access control that blocks non-admins.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Provides utility functions to export assets and repair tickets as CSV or Excel (via SheetJS) files, with helpers for CSV escaping and date formatting.
frontend/src/utils/fileParser.ts: Parses .xlsx, .csv, and .txt files to extract a list of serial numbers from the first column, dynamically loading SheetJS for Excel support and auto-detecting header rows.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Contains formatting helpers for timestamps, asset statuses, repair outcomes, and user roles, plus constants for models, clients, and enum value lists.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode support, custom OKLCH CSS-variable-based color tokens (primary, secondary, sidebar, etc.), Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, custom border radii, accordion animations, and the tailwindcss-animate and @tailwindcss/typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for an Internet Computer RBAC app ('Asset Repair Tracker') tracking existing features, known issues (admin unauthorized error), and pending feature requests around principal-based admin role assignment and user management.
